mapper.sql: user_id, user_name, role, email, tel, gender, birth_year, available_time, status, created_at, created_id, updated_at, updated_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user ( user_name, role, email, tel, gender, birth_year, available_time, status, created_at, created_id, updated_at, updated_id ) VALUES ( #{userName}, #{role}, #{email}, #{tel}, #{gender}, #{birthYear}, #{availableTime}, #{status}, NOW(), #{createdId}, NOW(), #{createdId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_user SET user_name = #{userName}, role = #{role}, email = #{email}, tel = #{tel}, gender = #{gender}, birth_year = #{birthYear}, available_time = #{availableTime}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_id = #{updatedId} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
